summary: Backend + frontend end-to-end testing for the new navigation restructure, /activites overview + 5 detail pages, hero CTA, and Emergent object storage upload/download. All 29 pytest tests pass (24 previous + 5 new upload). Frontend flows all functional: header primary nav (7 links), 'Nos activités' dropdown (Voir toutes + 5 sub-activities), 'Plus' dropdown (Partenaires/Certifications/RSE), hero-discover-btn → /activites, /activites lists 5 cards, detail pages show hero+intro+bullets+quote/products buttons+sidebar 4 other activities, mobile sheet contains all links+sub-activities+Plus section, admin upload workflow (login → open product dialog → upload png → URL populates with /api/files/stmp-agri/uploads/<uuid>.png → view/clear buttons appear → save creates product, cleanup delete works).
action_items: Minor: `toTestId(label)` in Header.jsx does .replace(/\s|é|è|à/g, '-').replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, '') — produces ugly testids like 'nav-nos-m-tiers', 'nav-actualit-s', 'nav-nos-r-alisations' because 'é' is replaced with '-' then following chars stripped. Consider proper accent-stripping (e.g. normalize('NFD').replace(/\p{Diacritic}/gu, '')) to yield readable testids: 'nav-nos-metiers', 'nav-actualites', 'nav-nos-realisations'. Functional but hurts maintainability and matches the request spec better (the review request literally asks for testid `nav-actualites`).
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx toTestId helper strips accents crudely (é/è/à → '-' then remaining diacritics removed as invalid), producing awkward testids that don't match what a reviewer/spec expects (e.g. `nav-nos-m-tiers` instead of `nav-nos-metiers`). Simple normalize() fix recommended.
storage_service.py uses `os.environ['EMERGENT_LLM_KEY']` at module import time — if the key is missing the whole backend fails to boot. Consider lazy fetching or clearer error.
download_file endpoint: media_type prefers stored content_type but the Response also passes headers.Cache-Control immutable — good, but no ETag/If-None-Match handling. Non-blocking.

No file cleanup route (soft-delete flag exists on db.files.is_deleted but no admin endpoint uses it). Uploaded assets are never removable via UI when the parent entity is deleted. Consider linking cleanup or a garbage collector.

Upload accepts SVG (in _ALLOWED_IMAGE_EXTS) but does not sanitize SVG contents — potential XSS if user-uploaded SVG is inlined. As currently images are only shown via tags it's safe, but worth a note.
seed_data_creation: None. Only ephemeral TEST_-prefixed data was created and cleaned up during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Header uses Radix DropdownMenu — must CLICK `[data-testid=nav-activites]` (hover does not open it). Testids generated by Header.toTestId() are: nav-nos-m-tiers, nav-nos-r-alisations, nav-actualit-s (accents dropped as '-'). If E1 fixes toTestId these become nav-nos-metiers etc. — update selectors accordingly. Upload endpoint returns URL relative like `/api/files/stmp-agri/uploads/<uuid>.<ext>` — resolveImageUrl on frontend prepends REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Storage service depends on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY env var + external endpoint integrations.emergentagent.com.
